name: Pistachio Chocolate Apples
recipeIngredient: 1.4 oz bar chocolate-covered toffee candy, chopped coarsely
6 medium-sized red eating apples (such as Gala, Empire, or Red Delicious)
recipeInstructions:
Prep time: 0 mins Cook time: 0 mins Difficulty:
1. In a heavy saucepan over low heat or microwave-safe bowl in microwave, melt chocolate, stirring until smooth. Set aside.
2. Place apples on a tray or plate. Remove stems if present and insert a stick into each through stem end. With a teaspoon, spoon melted chocolate over each apple around the stick, letting excess drip down the apple.
3. Sprinkle chocolate with toffee candy and pistachios. Refrigerate apples until chocolate is set.
Serves: 6
Nutrition information per apple - protein: 2 grams; fat: 12 grams; carbohydrate: 35 grams; fiber: 5 grams; sodium: 32 milligrams; cholesterol: 3 milligrams; calories: 235.
